description: This file contains unit tests for the Tooltip component in a JavaScript project, utilizing Jasmine testing framework. It tests various aspects of Tooltip behavior including initialization, configuration, show/hide functionality, event handling, and integration with DOM elements.

classes.name: Tooltip
classes.description: The Tooltip class provides tooltip functionality for DOM elements, including show/hide, configuration, and lifecycle management.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Returns the Tooltip instance associated with a DOM element, or null if none exists.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Returns the existing Tooltip instance or creates a new one with optional configuration.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: jQuery plugin interface for Tooltip, enabling jQuery-style method calls.
